Description: The Maximum Amount of Cyber Insurance Payable in a year regardless of the vector.

Business Interruption Exposure happens when business as usual is interrupted when the authorized users cannot access an application. In cyber, it is at the system level. It is based on the revenue lost over the period of time to get the system back on-line.

Quant Metric Name: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Privacy Sublimit
Description: Sublimit for a data breach of privacy data related to the state of CA law. Uses minimum fine.

Data Exfiltration Exposure happens when data is stolen by cyber criminals. This can be due to many causes including and not limited to mis-configured systems, poor access controls, from insiders or external actors. Specifically, it is the unauthorized copying, transfer or retrieval of data from a computer or server and is measured by the number of records stolen multiplied by the cost per record. Data exfiltration is a malicious activity performed through various techniques, typically by cybercriminals over the Internet or other networks.
GDPR Maximum Fine for violation of data subject rights
